title: Polypleurum stylosum
taxonomy: Polypleurum stylosum is classified within the family Podostemaceae, which is a family of aquatic plants commonly known as the "riverweed" family. This family is part of the larger clade of flowering plants (angiosperms) and is specifically placed within the order Malpighiales. The plant is further categorized into the order Malpighiales, the class Magnoliopsida, and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Within the family Podostemaceae, Polypleurum stylosum is part of the tribe Podostemoideae. The plant's classification provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationship to other plants.
